title: wollastonia kamolensis
intro: Wollastonia kamolensis, also known as Thai crowfoot, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Thailand. This plant has been traditionally used in Thai medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Wollastonia kamolensis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting potential anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of Wollastonia kamolensis are often made into infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin disorders and gastrointestinal issues.
